era_resolution: The Berlin Conference (1884-1885) attempted to regulate European colonization, ultimately leading to the division of African territories among European powers.
modern_resolution: Implementation of advanced economic diversification strategies, investment in education and technology, and fostering regional cooperation to mitigate systemic friction and promote sustainable development.

biblical_tie.context: And they that shall be of thee shall build the old waste places: thou shalt raise up the foundations of many generations; and thou shalt be called, The repairer of the breach, The restorer of paths to dwell in.

protocol: UESP-1777644303604: South Africa Systemic Realignment Initiative, focusing on integrated development, conflict resolution, and biblical principles for restoration and growth.
